nasb.text: Then the king of Israel when he saw them, said to Elisha, “My father, shall I kill them? Shall I kill them?”

esv.text: As soon as the king of Israel saw them, he said to Elisha, “My father, shall I strike them down? Shall I strike them down?”

cnv.text: 以色列王看見他們，就對以利沙說：“我父啊，我可以擊殺他們嗎？”

ccb.text: 以色列王看见他们，问以利沙说：“我父啊，我可以杀他们吗？”
